title: elaphoglossum corderoanum
intro: Elaphoglossum corderoanum, a species of epiphytic fern native to Central America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its secondary metabolites. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum corderoanum are thought to include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and potentially lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum corderoanum are often made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal effects.
